dvids.title: USS Canberra departs Colombo after scheduled port visit
dvids.desc: Independence-variant littoral combat ship USS Canberra (LCS 30) departed Colombo June 12, 2026, after a scheduled port visit to strengthen relations with the Sri Lanka Navy.

dvids.title: 229th MPs return to U.S. after successful deployment
dvids.desc: Virginia National Guard Soldiers assigned to the Hanover-based 229th Military Police Company, 276th Engineer Battalion, 329th Regional Support Group returned to the United States June 13, 2026, following their federal active duty deployment to the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility.
